svg.text: comm_pe.csl — the prefill block's communication toolbox
One scarce color+queue pool, time-shared across every phase. Correctness = count-exactness + backpressure/parity ordering; every rebind lands on a drained queue.
Block = P_BLOCK_SIZE x P_BLOCK_SIZE (8x8 in ref cfg). Y (rows) = HIDDEN dim shard. X (cols) = SEQUENCE (tokens). kv-band = a run of Y-PEs for one KV head.
A. Each collective / shuttle / matmul mapped to physical fabric motion
Bidirectional f32 chain -> root_2nd_phase, then P-2 router
that freed colors 3,4 for the shuttle.
MeshGEMM · left x_inter c6-8/q2 · right y_inter c9-11/q3
broadcast). Left = X-channel hops along Y; right =
Y-channel hops along X. left_matrix_shift skew reuses
the x channel (q2). Ring embedded on line by trace_perm.
cross-block · N/S c3/q7,c4/q0 · E/W c12,c13 reuse q7,q0
P-step BLOCKING shift register moves each PE's hidden
tile to same-coord PE one block over. Parity ordering
(even: send->recv; odd solid vs dashed: recv->send) =
Q@KT / softmax · S-chain c1,c2/q5,q6 + N-chain c3,c4/q7,q0
Split the band chain onto TWO disjoint color pairs so
each color's rx/tx depends only on band parity (painted
ONCE by enter_qkt_reduce). The per-step root then cycles
in pure logic with ZERO route repaint. N-chain borrows q7,q0.
B. Color + queue reuse map — which functions time-share each queue (every rebind is drained-safe)
N/S shuttle + Q@KT north chain (north_south_aux c3,c4)
Score x V band shift (band c18,c19,c20)
reconfig() is the ONE route-switch entry point: RECFG_FULL / RECFG_K paint reduce+bcast (G-3); RECFG_SH_OUT/IN paint the block's shuttle hop; block-edge routes clamped by terminate_dir (G-9).

Legend: red = reduce chain blue = broadcast / softmax purple = Cannon-left / N-chain green = Cannon-right orange = inter-block shuttle. All fabric DSD extents comptime; runtime variation goes in the count.
